div1.entryFree: Unbuckle, to loose from buckles, to unfasten, to take off (clothes): u., u. Wint. IV, 4, 661. == to pluck off in a scuffle: we have been down together in my sleep, --ing helms, fisting each other's throat, Cor. IV, 5, 131. he that --s this, till we do please to daff't for our repose, shall hear a storm, Ant. IV, 4, 12.
